title: ARTIS Attribute & Reference Tables — Taxonomy, Products, Countries, Population
abstract: Supporting lookup/reference tables for joining with the ARTIS trade and consumption datasets: taxonomic hierarchy and common names by scientific name (sciname.csv), minimum taxonomic resolution per HS-code/species combination (code_max_resolved.csv), product descriptions and forms by HS6 code (products.csv), country regional groupings (countries.csv), and standardized national population figures for per-capita calculations (standardized_fao_pop.csv).

variables.name: sciname
variables.label: Scientific Name
variables.description: Scientific name (species, genus, family, etc.) appearing in ARTIS; join key for trade/consumption files.

variables.name: sciname
variables.label: Scientific Name
variables.description: Scientific name for the code-sciname combination.

access.how_to_request: Bundled with the ARTIS trade/consumption data as reference tables; same access caveats as those sources apply.

provenance.originator: ARTIS (Aquatic Resource Trade in Species) research consortium

known_issues: Row counts for each embedded CSV are rough estimates derived from file size, not exact — exact counts require extracting the archive.

The archive's own attributes_README states the team is 'still developing complete metadata' for these tables. Documented join guidance: sciname.csv joins on 'sciname'; code_max_resolved.csv joins on hs_version + hs6 + sciname; products.csv should be de-duplicated after joining since some HS6 codes map to multiple product forms; standardized_fao_pop.csv joins on year + iso3c.
Same originator/license/DOI verification caveats as the ARTIS trade and consumption datasets.
ZIP also contains macOS resource-fork artifacts (__MACOSX/ entries).
